error_signature: Webhook not triggering when closed in editor
title: Webhook not triggering outside of editor
symptom: The webhook does not execute when sending a POST request after closing the editor. It only works when the workflow is open in the editor.
applies_when: Workflow is closed in the editor
not_this_if: Workflow is active and n8n is running on a server
root_cause: The Webhook node's 'Test' URL is designed for testing within the editor. For the 'Production' URL to work, the workflow must be activated and n8n must be running on a server or online, not just locally.
fix_steps: Ensure n8n is running on a server or online
Send the POST request to the 'Production' URL
agent_instruction: Activate the workflow and ensure n8n is running on a server to receive webhook requests.
